← All tools

QR Code Generator

Make a QR code that opens a link, joins a Wi-Fi network, starts an email, call or text — or just shows some text. Style it, then download it as a PNG or SVG. Everything happens in your browser.

No need to type https:// — it's added automatically if you leave it off.

Scanning the code offers to join the network. The password is stored in the code as plain text.

Scanning opens the person's mail app with everything filled in.

Scanning offers to call this number. Include the country code (like +1) so it works abroad.

Scanning opens a new text message to this number.

What gets encoded
(nothing yet)
Style & size

⚠ Low contrast — many scanners will fail to read this.

⚠ QR codes should be dark-on-light for best compatibility — consider swapping the colors.

Transparent background: whether it scans depends on what ends up behind the code — keep that light.

Loading QR engine…

Codes are generated locally — what you type never leaves this page. Only the tiny QR engine loads once from unpkg.com. · a max tool
